records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when Lao Cai Province announces the next Bac Ha traditional horse-racing festival date and venue.
limitations: The reviewed official source covers the Bac Ha traditional festival only and does not establish nationwide Vietnamese racing coverage.
The confirmed 2026 event has already occurred; future calendar rows require a new official announcement.
Race times, participants, results, prize information, and programme details remain excluded.
records.notes: The provincial source supports manual C-level confirmation for the bounded Bac Ha festival scope when a new official event notice is published.
